prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 25, title Storm Lord
Scene/background: ruined gothic citadel under a violet storm sky, distant towers, charged clouds, magical rain haze
Subject: central hooded battle-mage in ornate obsidian and silver armor, holding a crackling sphere of purple lightning, commanding storm energy
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy game illustration, highly detailed, painterly but sharp, readable silhouette, premium mobile game polish
Composition/framing: centered full figure, square composition, large clear focal point, room around the silhouette, readable at small size
Lighting/mood: violent magical lightning, luminous violet highlights, dramatic contrast, ominous and powerful
Color palette: black, obsidian, cold silver, electric violet, restrained magenta glow
Materials/textures: engraved metal, rune crystal, storm cloth, wet stone, lightning energy
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no extra characters, keep the face mostly hidden except glowing eyes, make the character feel upgraded and dangerous
